sme_leads.notes: Facebook/Instagram-only presence with no dedicated website, leaving it invisible in Google search despite an established local following.
Relies entirely on third-party booking platforms (Fresha, Booksy) and Facebook with no owned domain, making a simple branded site an easy upsell.
Dual unisex salon with fixed premises and Facebook/Instagram presence only — no website means zero organic local search visibility.
Uses Setmore, Nearcut, and Fresha booking pages but has no owned website domain, a strong candidate for a branded site that builds trust.
Over 1,500 Checkatrade reviews and 10+ years trading but no own website — a high-credibility tradesperson who'd benefit from direct lead capture without third-party fees.

dts.title: DVSA wait times just hit a record high — here's how to skip the queue
dts.hook: Open with the current DVSA average wait time stat, then demo the swap flow in 30 seconds.
dts.cta: Link in bio — swap your test date today

dts.title: POV: You just moved your driving test from August to next week
dts.hook: Notification sound + booking screen reveal + countdown timer — emotionally driven, shareable.
dts.cta: Comment 'SWAP' and I'll send you the link

athletics.title: 5-min warm-up → max effort 60m sprint — track session SO15
athletics.hook: Show warm-up, effort face, slow-mo replay, split time overlay. Caption: 'Train fast, think fast.'

athletics.title: Muscle-up to L-sit combo — park bars, no gym needed
athletics.hook: 30-second clean execution clip, caption: 'Discipline > motivation. Every time.'
athletics.cta: Save this for your next outdoor session

aimybiz.title: We ran 50 sales calls through our AI coach — here are the 3 phrases destroying conversions
aimybiz.hook: Data-led hook with specific phrases, end with a CloseCoach CTA for a free audit.
aimybiz.cta: DM me 'AUDIT' and I'll send you a free call analysis

aimybiz.title: What if every rep on your team had a personal coach on every call?
aimybiz.hook: Screen-share demo of CloseCoach analysing a roleplay call, tag sales managers in comments.
aimybiz.cta: Comment 'COACH' to see a live demo for your team
